lastReleaseMessage: Admin-configurable shift options and a full visual polish...

barRaise.topFinding: The seven-cycle freeze broke. The 06-02 drift-auto-fix actually fired and applied 11 doc edits to DESIGN.md, closing the version-pill MEDIUM (DESIGN.md:8 now reads v0.3.0) and the preference_log LOW, and a fresh canonical audit landed the same day. That is the first non-zero actionsClosed in seven runs. The product stays healthy and the audit-to-fix loop is now demonstrably working on the doc-only lane. What still rides into cycle seven is the code/secret lane that drift-auto-fix cannot touch: the Discord webhook URL is still committed and ungitignored (HIGH, the one genuine open risk), and write-dashboard-status.ps1 still hardcodes the M2 milestone and still nulls the barRaise block on every release. New this cycle and sharper than any of those: the drift-fix's 11 DESIGN.md improvements are uncommitted, and both the 06-02 audit and the drift-fix note recommend a git checkout . CRLF sweep before the next release. That blind sweep would erase the very doc improvements drift-fix just made. Commit the tree before anyone runs that command.
